Main Page | Class Hierarchy | Data Structures | File List | Data Fields

FreeFrame.h

00001 
00002 // FreeFrame.h
00003 //
00004 // FreeFrame is an open-source cross-platform real-time video effects plugin system.
00005 // It provides a framework for developing video effects plugins and hosts on Windows, 
00006 // Linux and Mac OSX. 
00007 // 
00008 // Copyright (c) 2002, 2003, 2004 www.freeframe.org
00009 // All rights reserved. 
00010 //
00012 
00014 //

00016 //      are permitted provided that the following conditions are met:

00023 //    distribution.
00024 //  * Neither the name of FreeFrame nor the names of its
00025 //    contributors may be used to endorse or promote products derived
00026 //    from this software without specific prior written permission.

00030 //      ANY EXPRESS OR IMPLIED WARRANTIES, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE IMPLIED 
00031 //      WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY AND FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE ARE DISCLAIMED.

00037 //      OR OTHERWISE) ARISING IN ANY WAY OUT OF THE USE OF THIS SOFTWARE, EVEN IF ADVISED 
00038 //      OF THE POSSIBILITY OF SUCH DAMAGE.

00054 
00055 
00056 #ifndef __FREEFRAME_H__
00057 #define __FREEFRAME_H__
00058 
00059 #if _MSC_VER > 1000
00060 #pragma once
00061 #endif
00062 
00063 
00065 // Includes
00067 
00068 #ifdef WIN32
00069 
00070 #define WIN32_LEAN_AND_MEAN             // Exclude rarely-used stuff from Windows headers
00071 #include <windows.h>
00072 
00073 #elif defined LINUX
00074 
00075 extern "C" {
00076 #include <string.h>
00077 #include <stdlib.h>
00078 
00079 #endif
00080 
00081 
00083 // FreeFrame defines
00085 
00086 // Function codes
00087 #define FF_GETINFO                                      0
00088 #define FF_INITIALISE                           1
00089 #define FF_DEINITIALISE                         2
00090 #define FF_PROCESSFRAME                         3
00091 #define FF_GETNUMPARAMETERS                     4
00092 #define FF_GETPARAMETERNAME                     5
00093 #define FF_GETPARAMETERDEFAULT          6
00094 #define FF_GETPARAMETERDISPLAY          7
00095 #define FF_SETPARAMETER                         8
00096 #define FF_GETPARAMETER                         9
00097 #define FF_GETPLUGINCAPS                        10
00098 #define FF_INSTANTIATE                          11
00099 #define FF_DEINSTANTIATE                        12
00100 #define FF_GETEXTENDEDINFO                      13
00101 #define FF_PROCESSFRAMECOPY                     14
00102 #define FF_GETPARAMETERTYPE                     15
00103 #define FF_GETIPUTSTATUS                        16
00104 
00105 // Return values
00106 #define FF_SUCCESS                                      0
00107 #define FF_FAIL                                         0xFFFFFFFF
00108 #define FF_TRUE                                         1
00109 #define FF_FALSE                                        0
00110 #define FF_SUPPORTED                            1 
00111 #define FF_UNSUPPORTED                          0 
00112 
00113 // Plugin types
00114 #define FF_EFFECT                                       0
00115 #define FF_SOURCE                                       1
00116 
00117 // Plugin capabilities
00118 #define FF_CAP_16BITVIDEO                       0
00119 #define FF_CAP_24BITVIDEO                       1
00120 #define FF_CAP_32BITVIDEO                       2
00121 #define FF_CAP_PROCESSFRAMECOPY         3
00122 #define FF_CAP_MINIMUMINPUTFRAMES       10
00123 #define FF_CAP_MAXIMUMINPUTFRAMES       11
00124 #define FF_CAP_COPYORINPLACE            15
00125 
00126 // Plugin optimization
00127 #define FF_CAP_PREFER_NONE                      0
00128 #define FF_CAP_PREFER_INPLACE           1
00129 #define FF_CAP_PREFER_COPY                      2
00130 #define FF_CAP_PREFER_BOTH                      3
00131 
00132 // Parameter types
00133 #define FF_TYPE_BOOLEAN                         0    
00134 #define FF_TYPE_EVENT                           1
00135 #define FF_TYPE_RED                                     2 
00136 #define FF_TYPE_GREEN                           3
00137 #define FF_TYPE_BLUE                            4
00138 #define FF_TYPE_XPOS                            5
00139 #define FF_TYPE_YPOS                            6
00140 #define FF_TYPE_STANDARD                        10
00141 #define FF_TYPE_TEXT                            100
00142 
00143 // Input status
00144 #define FF_INPUT_NOTINUSE                       0
00145 #define FF_INPUT_INUSE                          1
00146 
00147 // Image depth
00148 #define FF_DEPTH_16                                     0
00149 #define FF_DEPTH_24                                     1
00150 #define FF_DEPTH_32                                     2       
00151 
00152 // Image orientation
00153 #define FF_ORIENTATION_TL                       1
00154 #define FF_ORIENTATION_BL                       2
00155 
00156 
00158 // FreeFrame Types
00160 
00161 // Typedefs for Linux and MacOS - in Windows these are defined in files included by windows.h
00162 #if TARGET_OS_MAC
00163 typedef unsigned int DWORD;
00164 typedef unsigned char BYTE;
00165 #endif 
00166 
00167 #ifdef LINUX
00168 typedef unsigned int DWORD;
00169 typedef void* LPVOID;
00170 typedef char BYTE;
00171 #endif
00172 
00173 // PluginInfoStruct
00174 typedef struct PluginInfoStructTag {
00175         DWORD   APIMajorVersion;
00176         DWORD   APIMinorVersion;
00177         BYTE    PluginUniqueID[4];              // 4 chars uniqueID - not null terminated
00178         BYTE    PluginName[16];                 // 16 chars plugin friendly name - not null terminated
00179         DWORD   PluginType;                             // Effect or source
00180 } PluginInfoStruct;
00181 
00182 // PluginExtendedInfoStruct   
00183 typedef struct PluginExtendedInfoStructTag {
00184         DWORD PluginMajorVersion;
00185         DWORD PluginMinorVersion;
00186         char* Description;
00187         char* About;
00188         DWORD FreeFrameExtendedDataSize;
00189         void* FreeFrameExtendedDataBlock;
00190 } PluginExtendedInfoStruct;
00191 
00192 // VideoInfoStruct
00193 typedef struct VideoInfoStructTag {
00194         DWORD FrameWidth;                               // width of frame in pixels
00195         DWORD FrameHeight;                              // height of frame in pixels
00196         DWORD BitDepth;                                 // enumerated indicator of bit depth of video: 0 = 16 bit 5-6-5   1 = 24bit packed   2 = 32bit
00197         DWORD Orientation;                      
00198 } VideoInfoStruct;
00199 
00200 // ProcessFrameCopyStruct
00201 typedef struct ProcessFrameCopyStructTag {
00202         DWORD numInputFrames;
00203         void** ppInputFrames;
00204         void* pOutputFrame;
00205 } ProcessFrameCopyStruct;
00206 
00207 // SetParameterStruct
00208 typedef struct SetParameterStructTag {
00209         DWORD ParameterNumber;
00210         DWORD NewParameterValue;
00211 } SetParameterStruct;
00212 
00213 // plugMain function return values
00214 typedef union plugMainUnionTag {
00215         DWORD ivalue;
00216         float fvalue;
00217         VideoInfoStruct* VISvalue;
00218         PluginInfoStruct* PISvalue;
00219         char* svalue;
00220 } plugMainUnion;
00221 
00222 
00224 // Function prototypes
00226 
00228 // plugMain - The one and only exposed function
00229 // parameters: 
00230 //      functionCode - tells the plugin which function is being called
00231 //  pParam - 32-bit parameter or 32-bit pointer to parameter structure
00232 //
00233 // PLUGIN DEVELOPERS:  you shouldn't need to change this function
00234 //
00235 // All parameters are cast as 32-bit untyped pointers and cast to appropriate
00236 // types here
00237 // 
00238 // All return values are cast to 32-bit untyped pointers here before return to 
00239 // the host
00241 
00242 #ifdef WIN32
00243 
00244 BOOL APIENTRY DllMain(HANDLE hModule, DWORD ul_reason_for_call, LPVOID lpReserved);
00245 
00246 __declspec(dllexport) plugMainUnion __stdcall plugMain(DWORD functionCode, DWORD inputValue, DWORD instanceID);
00247 
00248 typedef __declspec(dllimport) plugMainUnion (__stdcall *FF_Main_FuncPtr)(DWORD, DWORD, DWORD);
00249 
00250 #elif LINUX
00251 
00252 plugMainUnion plugMain(DWORD functionCode, DWORD inputValue, DWORD instanceID);
00253 
00254 #elif TARGET_OS_MAC
00255 
00256 typedef void* (*FF_Main_FuncPtr)(DWORD, DWORD, DWORD);
00257 
00258 #endif
00259 
00260 
00261 #ifdef LINUX
00262 }
00263 #endif
00264 
00265 #endif
Generated on Wed Nov 10 23:03:49 2004 for FreeFrame SDK by 1.3.8
